title: Katoella delavayi

This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants. Katoella delavayi belongs to the genus Katoella, which is a group of succulent plants native to China. The species is further classified into different subspecies based on its unique features and geographical distribution. Katoella delavayi is a rare and endangered species due to its limited geographical range and habitat degradation.
uses: Katoella delavayi is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in its native regions of China and Southeast Asia.
